features: Essential Mist glows as it releases fragrant mist, to set an ambience in an instant
Lush aroma of cherry blossom and juicy raspberries with notes of violet leaf, whipped sugar and warm woods to bring a touch of sophistication
Infused with 2x more essential oils* (*vs existing Air Wick Essential Mist Diffuser Refills)
Diffuser is portable and has 4 intensity settings for fragrance control
Amazing fragrance lasting for up to 45 days* (*based on lowest setting)
description: Product Description Air Wick Essential Mist Diffuser glows as it mists to set an amazing fragrant ambience in an instant. The diffuser is portable, has easy to insert refills, and lasts for up to 45 days* (* based on lowest setting). Air Freshener. Airwick. Ingredients Contains: Hydrocarbons, C12-C16, isoalkanes, cyclics, <2% aromatics, Hydrocarbons, C11-C13, isoalkanes, <2% aromatics, 3,5,5-trimethylhexyl acetate, BENZYL ACETATE, LINALOOL, 4-TERTBUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, D-LIMONENE, ETHYL METHYLPHENYLGLYCIDATE, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, Tetramethyl acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, ROSE KETONE-4
